name: John Doe
subject: Never miss a JD Realty lead?
body:
Hi John,

Quick question: how many JD Realty leads are slipping through the cracks after hours?

We build simple AI assistants that answer client questions and qualify leads 24/7, so you never miss a deal.

We’re currently looking for one "Founding Agency" to partner with at a special rate of $500 setup + $100/mo.

Got 10 minutes this week for a quick demo?

Best,

[Your Name]
